allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://searchneu.com/api/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json' -d '{"query": "{ search\(query: \\"\\", subject: \\"CS\\", termId: \\"202530\\"\) { results { ... on ClassOccurrence { name subject classId desc } } } }"}')

Bash(curl -s https://api.searchneu.com/graphql -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json' -d '{"query": "{ __schema { queryType { fields { name description args { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } } } }"}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], '-', f['description'][:80] if f['description'] else '', [a['name'] for a in f['args']]\) for f in d['data']['__schema']['queryType']['fields']]")

Bash(curl -s https://api.searchneu.com/graphql -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json' -d '{"query": "{ __type\(name: \\"SearchResultItemConnection\\"\) { fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } }"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name']\) for f in d['data']['__type']['fields']]")

Bash(curl -s https://api.searchneu.com/graphql -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json' -d '{"query": "{ search\(query: \\"\\", subject: \\"CS\\", termId: \\"202530\\", first: 5\) { nodes { ... on ClassOccurrence { name subject classId desc } } } }"}')
